title: Comp1n 16x
description: A high quality PVP texture pack for minecraft java edition. The pack includes armor, swords, axes, pickaxes, (no shovels) items, wool, wood, & more.
body: This is a Minecraft Java PVP texture pack. I made it for complete fun, it is my first pack, but its shockingly good. Im super proud of it. You can use this pack to imrove certain tings in pvp. Like the view blocked from swords, and more. This pack edits armor, wood, cobblestone, stonebricks, swords, axes, pickaxes, and items. It doesnt change too much though, nothing like the sky or grass is changed in any way. I hope you have fun using this pack!
